languages.text: "Ничтожная в контексте галактики и заметная для данного звездного кластера. Хроноструктура Человечества в этом регионе значимо определется этим историческим эпизодом".

traits.locale_text: "Ничтожная в контексте галактики и заметная для данного звездного кластера. Хроноструктура Человечества в этом регионе значимо определется этим историческим эпизодом".

languages.text: "Infinitesimal on the scale of the galaxy yet substantial for this star cluster. The chronostructure of Humanity in this region was, to a great extent, determined by this specific historical episode."
languages.original_text: "Ничтожная в контексте галактики и заметная для данного звездного кластера. Хроноструктура Человечества в этом регионе значимо определется этим историческим эпизодом".

"Infinitesimal on the scale of the galaxy yet substantial for this star cluster. The chronostructure of Humanity in this region was, to a great extent, determined by this specific historical episode."

"An obvious statement. I considered this moment to be the most significant in the chronostructure of the Koronus Expanse. A rare relic in the hands of primitives was but a statistical error. Order has since been restored."
"Infinitesimal on the scale of the galaxy yet substantial for this star cluster. The chronostructure of Humanity in this region was, to a great extent, determined by this historical episode."

"Infinitesimal on the scale of the galaxy yet substantial for this star cluster. The chronostructure of Humanity in this region was, to a great extent, determined by this specific historical episode."

languages.text: «Infinitesimal en comparación con la galaxia, pero sustancial a efectos de este cúmulo de estrellas. La cronoestructura de la Humanidad en la región quedó determinada en gran medida por este episodio histórico concreto».
languages.original_text: "Infinitesimal on the scale of the galaxy yet substantial for this star cluster. The chronostructure of Humanity in this region was, to a great extent, determined by this specific historical episode."

traits.locale_text: «Infinitesimal en comparación con la galaxia, pero sustancial a efectos de este cúmulo de estrellas. La cronoestructura de la Humanidad en la región quedó determinada en gran medida por este episodio histórico concreto».

languages.text: “从银河的层面来看，确实微不足道，但在这片星团里却意义重大。人类在该区域的时序结构，在很大程度上，正是由这一特定历史事件决定的。”
languages.original_text: "Infinitesimal on the scale of the galaxy yet substantial for this star cluster. The chronostructure of Humanity in this region was, to a great extent, determined by this specific historical episode."

traits.locale_text: “从银河的层面来看，确实微不足道，但在这片星团里却意义重大。人类在该区域的时序结构，在很大程度上，正是由这一特定历史事件决定的。”

languages.text: « Infinitésimal à l'échelle de la galaxie, mais notable pour cet amas d'étoiles. L'histoire de l'humanité dans cette région a été en grande partie déterminée par cet épisode en particulier. »
languages.original_text: "Infinitesimal on the scale of the galaxy yet substantial for this star cluster. The chronostructure of Humanity in this region was, to a great extent, determined by this specific historical episode."

traits.locale_text: « Infinitésimal à l'échelle de la galaxie, mais notable pour cet amas d'étoiles. L'histoire de l'humanité dans cette région a été en grande partie déterminée par cet épisode en particulier. »

languages.text: "Galaksi ölçeğinde son derece küçük ama bu yıldız kümesi için oldukça büyük. Bu bölgedeki İnsanlığın kronoyapısı, büyük ölçüde bu spesifik tarihî olay tarafından belirlenmiştir."
languages.original_text: "Infinitesimal on the scale of the galaxy yet substantial for this star cluster. The chronostructure of Humanity in this region was, to a great extent, determined by this specific historical episode."

traits.locale_text: "Galaksi ölçeğinde son derece küçük ama bu yıldız kümesi için oldukça büyük. Bu bölgedeki İnsanlığın kronoyapısı, büyük ölçüde bu spesifik tarihî olay tarafından belirlenmiştir."

languages.text: 「銀河のスケールでは微々たるものだが、この星団にとっては大きな出来事だった。この歴史的出来事は、この地域の人類のクロノストラクチャーを大きく左右した。」
languages.original_text: "Infinitesimal on the scale of the galaxy yet substantial for this star cluster. The chronostructure of Humanity in this region was, to a great extent, determined by this specific historical episode."

traits.locale_text: 「銀河のスケールでは微々たるものだが、この星団にとっては大きな出来事だった。この歴史的出来事は、この地域の人類のクロノストラクチャーを大きく左右した。」

languages.text: Infinitesimal aus Sicht der Galaxis, aber substanziell für dieses Sterncluster. Die Chronostruktur der Menschheit in dieser Region wurde weitgehend von dieser spezifischen historischen Episode bestimmt."
languages.original_text: "Infinitesimal on the scale of the galaxy yet substantial for this star cluster. The chronostructure of Humanity in this region was, to a great extent, determined by this specific historical episode."
